title: Frontend Core Surfaces
description: Smoke coverage for implemented page rendering and basic API liveness in the frontend package.

tests.title: Landing page and dashboard pages render without server errors.
tests.description: This test verifies that the primary entry pages load successfully under deterministic local conditions. It catches route-level rendering crashes and invalid imports before deeper suites run.
preconditions: frontend dev server is running on localhost
deterministic fixture headers are enabled where supported
steps: Open /patients/dashboard and assert no error boundary
Open /doctors/dashboard and assert no error boundary
tests.successCriteria: All three pages respond successfully and no server-side 500 occurs.

tests.title: Core frontend API endpoints respond with non-500 behavior.
tests.description: This test validates that feature-support endpoints used by the frontend are reachable and return expected status classes. It is focused on crash detection and route presence rather than deep business assertions.
tests.successCriteria: No endpoint returns HTTP 500 and each route returns a deterministic structured response or controlled validation error.

tests.title: Doctor and patient consultation detail pages can be opened with dynamic IDs.
tests.description: This test verifies dynamic route handling for consultation detail pages. It is intended to catch route param regressions and component crashes caused by malformed loader assumptions.
preconditions: at least one deterministic consultation fixture ID is available
steps: Confirm both pages remain interactive after hydration
tests.successCriteria: Both dynamic pages render and hydrate without runtime errors.
